utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey honey ! I missed you today !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yeah . What Do you wanna do tonight ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Ok , trying to turn me on by making a mess ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_trying to turn me on by making a mess

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Besides , tomorrow we are doing those fertility tests and until then you need to keep your tadpoles in the tank .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: We really need to take those tests ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_tomorrow we are doing those fertility tests and until then you need to keep your tadpoles in the tank .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Honey , we have been trying to have a baby for over a year .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I think it is a good idea to find out if everything ok . Just a few routine tests .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: But I do not wanna do it in a cup !
